title: Plug Seals Monumental Deal with Allied Green Ammonia for a Mega 3 GW Electrolyzer System
content: Plug Power Inc. has signed a landmark agreement with Allied Green Ammonia (AGA) to supply 3 GW of electrolyzer capacity for AGA's green hydrogen-to-ammonia plant in Australia. Powered by a 4.5 GW solar plant, the facility will produce 2,700 metric tons of green ammonia daily to meet growing demand in Asia and Europe for agriculture, energy storage, transport, and industrial uses. Plug will develop a Basic Engineering and Design Package (BEDP) to attract investors, with manufacturing and delivery of electrolyzers starting in Q1 2027 after a positive Final Investment Decision expected by Q2 2025. This collaboration advances global green ammonia production and supports net-zero emissions goals.
author: Analysts Account
